comment: Pinned local devnet composition. Every component is exact so `loom devnet up` is reproducible; bump deliberately and re-run the bundler smoke.

entryPoint.comment: repo-pinned ERC-4337 v0.9, CREATE2-deployed at a 0x433709-prefixed vanity address because bundlers detect the EntryPoint version from the address prefix; re-mine the salt (tools/e2e docs) if the creation code hash changes

devAccounts.comment: anvil's well-known deterministic accounts — devnet only, never fund on a public chain
